It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882年}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 3]]

In {{ill|1882|ja|1882年}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]]

{{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882年}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882年}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also! == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]]

Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882年}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923年}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872年}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]]

It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859年}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]]

Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]]

In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:Kotohira shrines|ja|Category:金刀比羅神社}} [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:tier 2]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 3]][[Category: tier 3]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

{{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year }} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year }}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year }}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year }} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year }}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year }}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year }}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year }} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year }}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]][[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] }} {{Otori Faith}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{shinto-stub}}[[Category:11]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 2]][[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

{{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|12=draft}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|12=draft}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港|12=draft}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国|12=draft}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|12=draft}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|12=draft}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓|12=draft}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
