Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|12=draft}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|12=draft}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港|12=draft}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国|12=draft}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|12=draft}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|12=draft}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓|12=draft}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:bump1-19]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

{{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|12=draft}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|12=draft}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港|12=draft}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国|12=draft}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|12=draft}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|12=draft}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓|12=draft}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

revision.text:
{{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|12=draft}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}}, {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} | shrine_rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}} | established = {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minami-ku (Yokohama)|ja|南区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|12=draft}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|12=draft}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|12=draft}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|ja|崇徳天皇|12=draft}} * Ōtori Shrine ** {{Interlanguage link multi|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup}} == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In {{ill|1859|ja|1859th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6th year|12=draft}}), with the opening of {{ill|Yokohama Port|ja|横浜港|12=draft}}, the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|12=draft}} from {{ill|Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国|12=draft}}. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|12=draft}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|12=draft}}).
In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), along with the relocation of the {{ill|Yūkaku|ja|遊廓|12=draft}}, the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In {{ill|1882|ja|1882nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15th year|12=draft}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|12=draft}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=draft}} on September 1, {{ill|1923|ja|1923rd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12nd year|12=draft}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|12=draft}} on May 29, {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20th year|12=draft}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63rd year|12=draft}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft}} ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5th year|12=draft}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|12=draft}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|12=draft}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|12=draft}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|12=draft}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] }} {{Otori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former unranked shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] [[Category:Everybodywiki manual marking]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Mass imported shinto cult pages, need dummy edit imported for attriubtion, if they are redirects the redirects need to be reviewed, a11ing jawiki link which must be reviewed to see if the page is already present here. Later on the categories should be renamed too]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:completion tier 2]] }} [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]]

20 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社 up to rev 102876456
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 金刀比羅神社 |画像 = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} |所在地 = [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[南区 (横浜市)|南区]][[真金町]]1-3 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E|region:JP-14_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=金刀比羅・大鷲神社}} |祭神 = [[大物主命]]、[[崇徳天皇]]、[[鳥之石楠船神|天之鳥船命]] |社格 = 無格社 |創建 = [[1859年]]（[[安政]]6年） |本殿 = |別名 = 金刀比羅・大鷲神社 |例祭 = |神事 = |}} '''金刀比羅・大鷲神社'''（ことひら・おおとりじんじゃ）は、[[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[南区 (横浜市)|南区]][[真金町]]にある[[神社]]である。旧[[近代社格制度#無格社|無格社]]。[[法人登記|登記]]上の[[宗教法人]]名称は'''宗教法人金刀比羅神社'''（しゅうきょうほうじんことひらじんじゃ）。境内末社に[[伏見稲荷神社]]がある。 ==祭神== *金刀比羅神社 **[[大物主|大物主命]] **[[崇徳天皇]] *大鷲神社 **[[鳥之石楠船神|天之鳥船命]] ==歴史== ;金刀比羅神社 :[[1859年]]（[[安政]]6年）、[[横浜港]]開港にあたり、[[港崎遊郭]]の岩亀楼主人である岩槻屋佐吉が[[讃岐国]][[金刀比羅宮|象頭山 金毘羅大権現]]を[[勧請]]し、港崎町（現在の[[横浜公園]]の地）に祭祀した。
[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）に[[遊廓]]の移転とともに[[高島 (横浜市)|高島町7丁目]]の海側へ遷座し金刀比羅神社と改称した。[[1882年]]（明治15年）4月に同様の理由で真金町へ遷座した。
[[1923年]]（[[大正]]12年）[[9月1日]]の[[関東大震災]]と[[1945年]]（[[昭和]]20年）[[5月29日]]の[[横浜大空襲]]で共に被災。その度に再建されたが、現在の社殿は[[1988年]]（昭和63年）8月に更に再建されたもの。 ;大鷲神社 :[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）、港崎遊廓が高島町に移転した際、[[東京]]の[[吉原遊廓|吉原]]に倣い、「おとり様」を勧請した東京[[浅草]]の[[鷲神社 (台東区)|鷲神社]]なのか、その本筋である東京足立花畑の[[大鷲神社 (足立区)|大鷲神社]]なのかは明確でない。。この時より、浅草と同様に[[酉の市]]が行われるようになった。当初は境内の末社であり別宮となっていたが、現在は金刀比羅神社の相殿に祀られている。 ==所在地== *神奈川県横浜市南区真金町1-3 ==脚注== ==関連項目== *[[酉の市]] ==外部リンク== *[https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ 金刀比羅大鷲神社] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ことひらおおとりしんしや}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:金刀比羅神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] {{shinto-stub}}

[[1923年]]（[[大正]]12年）[[9月1日]]の[[関東大震災]]と[[1945年]]（[[昭和]]20年）[[5月29日]]の[[横浜大空襲]]で共に被災。その度に再建されたが、現在の社殿は[[1988年]]（昭和63年）8月に更に再建されたもの。 ;大鷲神社 :[[1872年]]（[[明治]]5年）、港崎遊廓が高島町に移転した際、[[東京]]の[[吉原遊廓|吉原]]に倣い、「おとり様」を勧請した東京[[浅草]]の[[鷲神社 (台東区)|鷲神社]]なのか、その本筋である東京足立花畑の[[大鷲神社 (足立区)|大鷲神社]]なのかは明確でない。。この時より、浅草と同様に[[酉の市]]が行われるようになった。当初は境内の末社であり別宮となっていたが、現在は金刀比羅神社の相殿に祀られている。 ==所在地== *神奈川県横浜市南区真金町1-3 ==脚注== ==関連項目== *[[酉の市]] ==外部リンク== *[https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ 金刀比羅大鷲神社] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ことひらおおとりしんしや}} [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:金刀比羅神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]] {{shinto-stub}}

It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/coordinates|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]], {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} | shrine_Rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}} | established = [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}}, [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Town|qq=}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Park|qq=}}).
In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]]

The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Town|qq=}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Park|qq=}}).
In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]]

The imported history from everybodywiki is patchwork and contains all the contributing users, but not all the revisions are actually present. Lets hope this is sufficient attribution though especially since most of them are mine.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:28, 2 May 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/coordinates|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]], {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} | shrine_Rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}} | established = [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}}, [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Town|qq=}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Park|qq=}}).
In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:横浜市南区の建築物]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]]

In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:横浜市南区の歴史]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This page was originally created in the draft namespace on english wikipedia. It was then deleted but preserved on everybodywiki. The imported history from everybodywiki is patchwork and contains all the contributing users, but not all the revisions are actually present. Lets hope this is sufficient attribution though especially since most of them are mine.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:28, 2 May 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/coordinates|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]], {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} | shrine_Rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}} | established = [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}}, [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Town|qq=}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Park|qq=}}).
In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]]

The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove invalid enwiki interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This page was originally created in the draft namespace on english wikipedia. It was then deleted but preserved on everybodywiki. The imported history from everybodywiki is patchwork and contains all the contributing users, but not all the revisions are actually present. Lets hope this is sufficient attribution though especially since most of them are mine.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:28, 2 May 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=original page at [[:en:draft:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:35, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=This page was originally created by Immanuelle as a wikipedia draft. It was then automatically transferred to everybodywiki and recovered from there. In the future it will be good to import the revisions. Check page history in case this page was moved, since the everybodywiki page may have been under a different title[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:10, 11 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kotohira & Ōtori Jinjja.jpg|250px]]
Torii and Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|26|13|N|139|37|43|E}}}} | location = [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} 1-3 | coordinates = {{ill|coordinates|ja|ウィキ座標|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/coordinates|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]), [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]], {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|3=鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} | shrine_Rank = Former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}} | established = [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}) | main_hall = | other_names = Kotohira Ōtori Shrine | annual_festival = | rituals = }} '''Kotohira Ōtori Shrine''' (金刀比羅・大鷲神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}}, [[:en:Minami-ku, Yokohama|Minami-ku (Yokohama)]], [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Unranked Shrine|ja|無格社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unranked Shrine|qq=}}. The registered name as a religious corporation is '''Religious Corporation Kotohira Shrine''' (宗教法人金刀比羅神社). The shrine grounds also include a subordinate shrine dedicated to {{ill|Fushimi Inari Shrine|ja|伏見稲荷神社|1=Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Inari-taisha|qq=}}. == Deities == * Kotohira Shrine ** {{ill|Ōmononushi|ja|大物主命|1=Ōmononushi|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmononushi|qq=}} ([[Konpira Gongen]]) ** [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Emperor Sutoku]] * Ōtori Shrine ** {{ill|Ame-no-torifune|ja|鳥之石楠船神|vertical-align=sup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-torifune|qq=}} [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] == History == ; Kotohira Shrine In [[:en:1859|1859]] ({{ill|Ansei 6|ja|安政6年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei 6|qq=}}), with the opening of [[:en:Port of Yokohama|Yokohama Port]], the proprietor of the Iwakame Rō brothel in the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}}, Sakichi of Iwatsukiya, enshrined the {{ill|Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|ja|象頭山 金毘羅大権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zōzu-san Konpira Daigongen|qq=}} from [[:en:Sanuki Province|Sanuki Province]]. The shrine was initially established in the {{ill|Minatozaki Town|ja|港崎町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Town|qq=}} area (the current site of {{ill|Yokohama Park|ja|横浜公園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Park|qq=}}).
In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), along with the relocation of the [[:en:Yūkaku|Yūkaku]], the shrine was moved to the coastal area of Takashima Town 7-chōme and renamed Kotohira Shrine. In [[:en:1882|1882]] ({{ill|Meiji 15|ja|明治15年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 15|qq=}}), it was relocated again to {{ill|Magane Town|ja|真金町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Magane Town|qq=}} for the same reasons.
The shrine was damaged during both the {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|qq=}} on September 1, [[:en:1923|1923]] ({{ill|Taishō 12|ja|大正12年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishō 12|qq=}}) and the {{ill|Yokohama Air Raid|ja|横浜大空襲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Air Raid|qq=}} on May 29, [[:en:1945|1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa 20|ja|昭和20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 20|qq=}}). Although it was rebuilt each time, the current main shrine building was reconstructed in [[:en:1988|1988]] ({{ill|Shōwa 63|ja|昭和63年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa 63|qq=}}). ; Ōtori Shrine In [[:en:1872|1872]] ({{ill|Meiji 5|ja|明治5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji 5|qq=}}), when the {{ill|Minatozaki Yūkaku|ja|港崎遊郭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minatozaki Yūkaku|qq=}} was moved to Takashima Town, a deity known as the "Otorisama" was enshrined following the example of {{ill|Yoshiwara Yūkaku|ja|吉原|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara Yūkaku|qq=}} in {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo|qq=}}.It is unclear whether this refers to {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|1=Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taitō)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Taito Ward)|qq=}} in Asakusa, Tokyo, or {{ill|Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi Ward)|lt=Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|ja|大鷲神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} in Hanahata, Adachi, Tokyo. From this time, the {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} festival was held, similar to Asakusa. Initially, it was a subordinate shrine within the grounds, but it is now enshrined alongside Kotohira Shrine. == location == * 1-3 Magane Town, Minami-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://yokohama-torinoichi.jimdofree.com/ Kotohira Ōtori Shrine] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ōtori Faith}} {{shinto-stub}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{translated page|ja|金刀比羅・大鷲神社|qq=Konpira and Ōtori Shrine|version=102876456|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Shrines in Yokohama]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinbutsu shūgō]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[every:Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Kotohira & Ōwashi Shrine]] [[ja:金刀比羅・大鷲神社]] [[sn:onpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[sn:Konpira and Ōtori Shrine]] [[Category:横浜市の神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:History of Minami-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧無格社]]
